subject: Product Management
title: Notion's Community-Led Growth
description: A 60-second lesson on Notion's Community-Led Growth.

hook.text: Notion's biggest growth channel isn't ads or sales — it's a global community of users creating and sharing templates.

buildup.text: Notion ambassadors organize meetups, create YouTube tutorials, and build template galleries.

discovery.text: Community-led growth turns passionate users into evangelists.

twist.text: Notion's flexibility is both its strength and weakness. New users are overwhelmed by possibilities.

climax.text: The community created what Notion couldn't: thousands of use-case-specific solutions that lower the learning curve for new users.

punchline.text: Build for power users. Let them teach everyone else.

quiz.question: How does Notion's community drive growth?
options: Users create templates, tutorials, and meetups that lower the learning curve and drive organic discovery
Notion pays community members a salary
The community replaces Notion's product team
